raw.subject: Visalia page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your page caught my eye, especially the post about expanding your service area to help more people in Visalia. I think it's great that you're dedicated to serving the local community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be making it harder for people to find and book your services. 

I sketched out a simple homepage idea based on your Facebook photos and posts. It would include a services menu, a work gallery to showcase your team's skills, and a clear way for visitors to book appointments. You could also highlight your hours and location.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/richards-towing-visalia

If you'd like to discuss turning this into a real website, there's a straightforward flat fee for local businesses like yours. Let's reply here or schedule a quick call to get started.
